3005910.name: Legend vs. Legion
3005910.description:
THE WORLD'S LAST HOPE...

Kingdom Valia is in ruin. Roads are infested with bandits and ratfolk marauders. Safe havens are safe no longer, having been overtaken by vicious orcs, cunning goblins, enchanted golems, bomb-hurling automata, and ... animated crops?!

Legend... you must clear the land of this evil!

A VAST ARRAY OF SPELLS AT YOUR DISPOSAL...

Gather potent spells and mystic artifacts as you conquer mighty foes. Strategically choose among choices of spells and artifacts to develop your own unique playstyle. As you grow stronger, use your new powers to keep enemies from passing!

SLASH, DODGE, AND ROLL YOUR WAY TO VICTORY...

.

Survive the onslaught of arrows, fireballs, bombs, swords, slime ooze, and eggplant seeds that come your way - and then strike!

A UNIQUE BLEND OF GENRES...

LEGEND vs. LEGION blends elements of arcade, roguelite, base defense, and bullet hell gameplay into one chaotic adventure. Journey through strange lands and prevent enemies from passing, by sword and spell. Choose your arsenal to fit your desired fighting style - whether as an adept spellsword, a mighty warrior, a dextrous fighter, a well-rounded druid, and so on.

FEATURING...

  • Roguelite gameplay - each playthrough offers a unique challenge with randomly chosen abilities + artifacts

  • Character progression - unlock and upgrade your arsenal by completing side missions, to become the most powerful defender of the realm.

  • High replayability, countless synergies - over 160+ enemies and 20+ bosses to encounter across 10+ biomes, and dozens of spells and artifacts that synergize in unique ways.

  • Easy to pick up, hard to master - you'll need strategy, reflexes, and resilience to survive against the Legion.
